name: Ransomware Intrusion Chain
description: Full ransomware attack chain from initial access through deployment and extortion
root_objective: Deploy ransomware across the enterprise and extort the organisation

nodes.title: Deploy Ransomware and Extort Organisation
nodes.description: Encrypt critical systems and exfiltrate data for double extortion

nodes.title: Gain Initial Foothold
nodes.description: Establish initial access to the target network

nodes.title: Phishing with Loader Malware
nodes.description: Deliver initial loader via phishing email that downloads second-stage payload

nodes.title: Exploit Internet-Facing Service
nodes.description: Exploit vulnerability in VPN, RDP, or web application for initial access

nodes.title: Establish Persistence and Escalate
nodes.description: Maintain access and obtain elevated privileges for lateral movement

nodes.title: Deploy Persistent Backdoor
nodes.description: Install persistent access mechanism (scheduled task, service, or registry modification)

nodes.title: Exfiltrate Data for Double Extortion
nodes.description: Stage and exfiltrate sensitive data before encryption for leverage in extortion

nodes.title: Identify and Stage Sensitive Data
nodes.description: Locate and collect financial records, PII, IP, and other high-value data

nodes.title: Exfiltrate via Cloud Storage
nodes.description: Upload staged data to attacker-controlled cloud storage service

nodes.title: Deploy Ransomware and Destroy Backups
nodes.description: Simultaneously encrypt systems and neutralize recovery options

nodes.title: Delete/Encrypt Backup Systems
nodes.description: Destroy or encrypt backup infrastructure to prevent recovery without paying ransom

nodes.title: Mass Deploy Encryptor via GPO/PsExec
nodes.description: Use Group Policy, PsExec, or WMI to deploy ransomware encryptor to all reachable systems
